template: Vouch for my brother in the upcoming council vote — your reputation will carry weight where mine cannot.
Speak at the Pinewood summit. They listen to those whose alignment runs clean.
Plant a sapling at the southern grove, in my mother's name. I'm not allowed near that ground anymore.
Carry word to the goddess's emissary that her shrine still stands. She'll trust you where she'd doubt me.
Find the runoff source poisoning the Thornwood stream. I've watched it brown for a season.
The wolves have been thinning. Track the pack-leader and bring me what you find — I won't ask why.
Speak the Sovereign's refusal at the western gate before sundown. Your debt makes the words land.
Stand in my place at the Refusal Archive. I cannot enter; you can.
Bring me a token from beyond this district. I want to know the world is still wider than the gate.
Witness me train tomorrow at dawn. A worked move with no audience is a half-move.
